summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Magnetic Effects of Electric Current in science.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 10 science explains the core concepts of Magnetic Effects of Electric Current. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
